requestPresets.title: Request presets
requestPresets.description: Save the current prompt, model, mode, and parameters, then restore the setup later.
requestPresets.openDescription: Save, restore, edit and delete request setups.
requestPresets.name: Name
requestPresets.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, prompt, model or note
requestPresets.empty: No presets yet. Save the current request setup and it will appear here.
requestPresets.appliedNotice: Preset applied. Runtime attachments were cleared.
requestPresets.appliedToDraftNotice: Preset applied to the selected request. Runtime attachments were cleared.
requestPresets.modelMissingNotice: Preset applied, but its saved model is no longer available. The current model was kept instead.
